title: A Cook’s Kicks Take Over
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on a cook’s kicks take over, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Cook’s Kicks Take Over. Sanji battles Mr. 2 Bon Clay, whose mimicry turns the fight into a test of recognition and trust. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm fine, just please look after Carue for me!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Who the hell are you any- ways!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: You stole my sharpshooter's precious goggles...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Unlike him, I'm not gonna go down easily...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So you're one of the Straw- Hats?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hmm... Then maybe you're the rumoured Mr. Prince...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A first- rate chef of the seas.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: A first-rate chef, you say!? Well I'll have you know I'm a first-rate okama!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A mere chef shouldn't be interfering with a criminal organization!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're not the only one in the criminal business. I'm a chef and a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Am eye for an eye, you say?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You better not mess with this country.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: where are they!? Where's Mr. 4 and his pair!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've come to back you up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: USOP... Good to see you're alright...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You were worrying about ME!? I should be worrying about YOU!

summary: This part develops a cook’s kicks take over and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
